elements: Mantine Card (same wrapper) with icon + title header
notes: Empty-state is again the Mantine Alert info callout — same pattern as /alerts and /rules.
Card titles DO have leading icons here (bell for Active, bell-off for Dropped) — matches /status icon-in-title pattern, differs from /tsdb-status and /flags which have no icons.
'Dropped Alertmanagers' uses a crossed-bell icon; 'Active Alertmanagers' uses a plain bell. Consistent with icon semantics, no issue.
